hooks.command: echo '' && echo '╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════╗' && echo '║  PROXY ME — Auth0 Hackathon                      ║' && echo '╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════╣' && echo '║  RULE 1: @auth0/ai-vercel — NEVER mocked         ║' && echo '║  RULE 2: requestApproval HALTS for real          ║' && echo '║  RULE 3: StepUpCard is the hero                  ║' && echo '║  RULE 4: Syne + DM Sans + DM Mono fonts only     ║' && echo '║  RULE 5: Every step written to Supabase          ║' && echo '╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════╝' && echo '' && LESSONS='.claude/LESSONS.md' && if [ -f "$LESSONS" ]; then COUNT=$(grep -c '^## LESSON' "$LESSONS" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "📚 LESSONS.md — $COUNT lesson(s) loaded. Read before writing code."; else echo '📚 LESSONS.md not found — will be created on first correction.'; fi && echo ''

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | node -e "process.stdin.resume();let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const p=JSON.parse(d);console.log(p.file_path||p.path||'')}catch(e){console.log('')}})"); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>&1 | head -30 || true; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | node -e "process.stdin.resume();let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const p=JSON.parse(d);console.log(p.file_path||p.path||'')}catch(e){console.log('')}})"); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | node -e "process.stdin.resume();let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const p=JSON.parse(d);console.log(p.command||'')}catch(e){console.log('')}})"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(rm -rf [^.])'; then echo '{"block": true, "message": "Blocked potentially destructive command"}' >&2; exit 2; fi
